extraction_note: Primary source (HTML markdown) is thin on embedded CSS and inline style attributes — the page is a Shopify storefront with external stylesheets not available in the scraped content. No SVG gradients, no CSS custom properties, and no embedded <style> blocks were present in the HTML source. All colour extractions rely on branding_json (cross-validated tier). The primary red (#B01D21) is confirmed as the dominant CTA/brand colour via buttonPrimary and logo URL filename ('sabertooth-red-cmyk'). Secondary red (#BA2025) is very close to primary and appears in branding_json.colors.secondary — it may be a near-duplicate artefact; it is retained but flagged. branding_json.colors.link '#FF0000' is pure red and does not appear verbatim anywhere in html_source; it is demoted and excluded from palette as it likely represents a browser/Shopify default link colour, not a brand-defined value. branding_json.colorScheme says 'light' — the HTML content shows a white background with no evidence of dark section backgrounds, so light scheme is confirmed. Font 'Maax' appears only in branding_json — it is a proprietary typeface not found on Google Fonts; 'MontserratOmnisend' appears in branding_json.fonts as role 'unknown' and is likely an Omnisend email plugin font, not a primary brand typeface — it is noted but not elevated to a primary role. No SVG gradient definitions were found in the HTML source. The red-icon.png referenced in the markdown confirms red as a recurring accent colour. No chart or data visualisation elements were observed in the source.

palette.name: Sabertooth Red
palette.usage: Primary CTA buttons, key headings, brand accent elements, icon fills, logo colour. Use as the dominant action-driver colour on covers and infographics.

palette.name: Pure White
palette.usage: Page background, card surfaces, section backgrounds. Use as the dominant canvas colour for light-mode assets.

palette.name: Pure Black
palette.usage: Body copy, paragraph text, labels, and descriptive text on light backgrounds.

palette.name: Light Grey
palette.usage: Form field backgrounds, card secondary surfaces, subtle background differentiation between sections.

palette.name: Button White
palette.usage: Text colour on primary red CTA buttons and on any dark red/coloured surface where white legibility is needed.

colours.proportion_rule: 65% white/light surfaces (#FFFFFF, #EEEEEE), 25% black/dark text (#000000), 10% brand red accent (#B01D21)

backgrounds.light_variant: Solid white #FFFFFF with light grey #EEEEEE surface differentiation

borders_and_rules.application: Section dividers, card outlines, and FAQ separator lines observed structurally in the page layout

decorative_elements: Red circular icon bullets (red-icon.png) used as list item markers in benefit/feature lists — small solid red circle motif
Star rating imagery (star.png, small-star.png) in testimonial sections — yellow star motif on white background
Video background hero section with overlay text — full-width cinematic treatment

iconography.colour_usage: Red (#B01D21) for functional bullet/list icons; standard photographic product imagery for product cards

data_visualisation.chart_aesthetic: Not observed in source. Derived from brand: clean flat chart aesthetic on white #FFFFFF canvas, minimal gridlines in #EEEEEE, data labels in #000000, with #B01D21 as primary data series highlight colour.
data_visualisation.stat_callout_format: Large bold number in Maax or Helvetica 700 weight in #B01D21 or #000000, with descriptive label in lighter weight below in #000000 body text

brand_marks.logo_placement_convention: Top-left on site header; centered treatment appropriate for social and cover assets

brand_guardrails.avoid: Using gradients, colour washes, or multi-colour backgrounds — no gradient evidence exists in source
brand_guardrails.instead: Use solid flat fills: white #FFFFFF as canvas, black #000000 for text, and #B01D21 red as the single accent/highlight colour

brand_guardrails.avoid: Introducing secondary palette colours not present in the brand source (e.g. blues, greens, purples, teals)
brand_guardrails.instead: Restrict palette to #B01D21, #FFFFFF, #000000, and #EEEEEE — the four verified brand colours

brand_guardrails.avoid: Soft rounded corners or heavily organic shapes — the brand uses functional pill buttons (50px radius) not decorative softness
brand_guardrails.instead: Use pill-shaped CTAs (50px radius) for buttons and minimal 4px radius for cards and containers

brand_guardrails.avoid: Heavy drop shadows, emboss effects, or 3D dimensional treatments
brand_guardrails.instead: Flat, shadow-free surfaces consistent with the brand's no-shadow component styling

brand_guardrails.avoid: Decorative typography treatments such as outlined text, condensed display faces, or stylised lettering
brand_guardrails.instead: Clean, bold Maax or DM Sans (fallback) in 700 weight for headings; Helvetica/Arial system stack for body

brand_guardrails.avoid: Low-contrast colour pairings or red text on white at small body-copy sizes
brand_guardrails.instead: Reserve #B01D21 for headlines, CTAs, and bullet icons only; use #000000 for all body and descriptive text on #FFFFFF

generation_suffixes.core: Crisp white #FFFFFF canvas with bold Sabertooth Red #B01D21 accents on headlines, CTA elements, and icon markers. Pure black #000000 body typography in clean sans-serif Maax weight 700 for titles. Flat geometric shapes, pill-button motifs, zero drop shadows, minimal #EEEEEE surface differentiation. Direct, professional tech-connectivity authority register.
generation_suffixes.infographic: White #FFFFFF infographic canvas with #B01D21 red used for stat callout numbers, section header accents, and bullet icon markers. Black #000000 data labels and body text in clean bold Maax sans-serif. Flat bar or icon-driven data visualisation with #EEEEEE neutral fills for secondary data series. Direct and professional tech-connectivity tone, no gradients, no shadows.
generation_suffixes.cover_image: Bold flat white #FFFFFF cover canvas with Sabertooth Red #B01D21 applied to the primary headline and a strong horizontal accent band or rule. Display typography in Maax bold 700 weight in #000000 or #B01D21 for maximum contrast. Flat geometric treatment, pill-shaped button call-to-action element in #B01D21 with white #FFFFFF text. Professional, assertive, connectivity-industry authority tone.
generation_suffixes.social_square: Clean white #FFFFFF square canvas with #B01D21 red as the hero accent colour on the dominant headline or icon element. Bold Maax 700 heading in #000000 or reversed white on a #B01D21 red panel. Flat minimal aesthetic with #EEEEEE as a subtle secondary surface if needed. No gradients, no shadows, direct tech-professional tone with strong contrast and brand-red emphasis.
